constraints.name: permutation_constraint
constraints.description: The integers assigned to the N vertices must form a permutation of the given multiset c_1, c_2, ..., c_N, preserving the exact frequency of each value.
constraints.formal: \{d_1, d_2, \ldots, d_N\} = \{c_1, c_2, \ldots, c_N\} \text{ as multisets}

constraints.name: connectivity
constraints.description: The input graph is guaranteed to be a tree, meaning it is connected and acyclic with exactly N-1 edges.

objective.description: Maximize the sum of the minimum values assigned to the endpoints of each edge in a tree.

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: 标准解法在遍历树的过程中,始终将当前剩余的最大数值分配给新访问的节点。该单调递减的分配策略保证了在任意时刻,已确定值的节点构成的连通子树中,父节点的值恒不小于子节点的值,从而使得每条边的贡献值稳定等于子节点的值,最终总分收敛于所有数值之和减去最大值。
